basic_details.job_title: SMC Apprentices Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 1000 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Surat Mahanagar Palika (Surat Municipal Corporation), Surat, Gujarat
basic_details.short_information: Surat Municipal Corporation is recruiting 1000 Apprentices across 14 trades under the Apprentices Act 1961, with online applications open from 01 June to 10 June 2026.

important_dates.document verification date: To be intimated via registered mobile number and email

application_fee.details: The notification does not mention any application fee for this apprentice recruitment. Candidates should refer to the official notification on the SMC website for any updates before applying.

age_limit.details: Candidates must be a minimum of 18 years and must not exceed 34 years of age. Age relaxation will be as per Government of India / Government of Gujarat guidelines for reserved category candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: ITI Trade Pass (for trades 1–9) OR relevant graduation/degree as specified trade-wise (for trades 10–14). Refer vacancy table for trade-specific qualification details.
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as per the Apprentices Act, 1961 and the provisions of this notification. Mandatory registration and eKYC update on the NAPS portal (https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in) must be completed before applying on the SMC website. Candidates must apply only through the SMC official website after completing NAPS registration.

vacancy_details.Educational Qualification: B.Com (M.Com candidates will be given preference)
Mass Communication / Journalism and Mass Communication / B.A. (Journalism and Mass Communication)

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 9,600/- per month (ITI trades – Health Sanitary Inspector, Computer Operator); Rs. 10,560/- per month (ITI trades – Electrician, Fitter, Draughtsman, Surveyor, Mechanic); Rs. 12,300/- per month (Graduation/Degree level trades)

selection_process: Selection for engagement of apprentices will be based on merit / document verification. No written examination has been announced. Final engagement is subject to verification of eligibility and documents as per the Apprentices Act
Stage 1 – Online Application and NAPS Registration

Candidates must first complete registration and eKYC update on the NAPS portal (https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in) and then apply online on the SMC recruitment portal. Only candidates with a 100% completed NAPS profile with eKYC updated are eligible to apply on the SMC website.

Shortlisted candidates will be intimated about the document verification date via their registered mobile number and email ID. Candidates must appear with the original application form and all original documents along with self-attested copies. Candidates absent for document verification will have their candidature cancelled. Any discrepancy found between the application and original documents at any stage will result in cancellation of candidature.
the Apprenticeship contract will be generated on the Government website. The apprenticeship period will be as per the contract generated. On completion of the apprenticeship period
candidates will be immediately discharged. If a candidate leaves the apprenticeship before completion
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only. Before applying, every candidate must mandatorily: (1) register as an Apprentice on the NAPS portal at https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in, and (2) update eKYC in the Apprentice profile. Only after completing both steps on the NAPS portal should candidates proceed to apply online at the SMC recruitment portal. For more details, candidates may contact the Recruitment Division on Phone No. 0261-2423751-56 (Extension-231).
Documents to be Produced at the time of Document Verification:
Printed copy of the online application form
All original educational qualification certificates and mark sheets (ITI Trade Certificate / Degree Certificate as applicable to the trade applied for)
Date of Birth certificate / School Leaving Certificate
NAPS portal registration and eKYC completion proof
Self-attested copies of all above documents
For queries: Phone: 0261-2423751-56 (Extension-231) – Recruitment Division, Surat Municipal Corporation
important_instructions: THIS IS NOT A PERMANENT EMPLOYMENT. The apprenticeship period is as per the contract generated on the Government website and candidates will be immediately discharged on completion of the apprenticeship period. Mandatory NAPS portal registration with eKYC update must be completed before applying on the SMC website. Applications submitted without prior NAPS registration will not be processed. Candidates who have already completed an apprenticeship in any trade are not eligible — online contract generation will not be possible for such candidates. Stipend payable to apprentices is subject to Government policy and guidelines as amended from time to time. Document verification date and intimations will be sent only to the registered mobile number and email ID provided in the application. In case of change in mobile number or email, SMC will not be responsible for any future communication gaps. Candidates must appear for document verification with both original documents and self-attested copies. Absence from document verification will result in automatic cancellation of candidature. If, during scrutiny of application form and documents, any candidate is found not meeting the eligibility criteria under the Apprentices Act or the notification provisions, or if any discrepancy is found between the application and original certificates, candidature will be cancelled at any stage. If a candidate leaves the apprenticeship before completion of the period, the contract will be terminated. The Appointing Authority (SMC) reserves full rights to cancel this notification, cancel any trade, or make any modifications for any reason without being obligated to provide reasons for the same.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Surat Municipal Corporation Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for Surat Municipal Corporation Apprentice Recruitment 2026 is 10 June 2026 up to 11:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in SMC Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 1000 apprentice vacancies across 14 different trades under Surat Municipal Corporation.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for Surat Municipal Corporation Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is online only through the SMC website after completing mandatory NAPS registration.

faq.question: Q4. What is the stipend for SMC Apprentice posts in 2026?
faq.answer: The monthly stipend ranges from ₹9,600 to ₹12,300, depending on the ITI or degree-level trade.

faq.question: Q5. What are the eligibility criteria for Surat Municipal Corporation Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Indian citizens aged 18–34 years, with ITI trade pass or relevant degree as per the trade and must be registered on the NAPS portal.

faq.question: Q6. Is NAPS registration mandatory for SMC Apprentice 2026 application?
faq.answer: Yes, NAPS portal registration and eKYC completion on apprenticeshipindia.gov.in are mandatory before applying on the SMC website.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates who have already completed an apprenticeship apply for SMC Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates who have already completed any apprenticeship under the Apprentices Act are not eligible, as a new contract cannot be generated.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Surat Municipal Corporation Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is merit-based followed by document verification, and there is no written examination.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for Surat Municipal Corporation Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
